chunks.text: 2012 Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium || BEARS UC Berkeley BEARS 2012 Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium Thursday, February 23, 2012 Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences UC Berkeley Program: Pauley Ballroom, ASUC Building, UC Berkeley Video Session 1 (Claire Tomlin, David Wagner, Michael Jordan) Video Session 2 (Graduate student research presentations) Home Registration Campus Map Public Parking Accommodations Things to Do in Berkeley EECS Homepage EECS Faculty EECS Research BEARS 2011 BEARS 2010 BEARS 2009 BEARS 2008 BEARS 2007 BEARS 2006 BEARS 2005 BEARS 2004 08:00am - 08:45am Continental Breakfast and Registration 08:45am - 09:00am Welcome - Costas Spanos , Chair of EECS Announcement of EE and CS Distuinguished Alumni award winners EE : Sehat Sutardja , CEO, Chairman and Co-founder of the Marvell Technology GroupPh.D. '88 Charles Shank , former Director of the Lawrence Berkeley National Lab (Ph.D. '69) CS : Klaus Schauser , Founder and Chief Strategist at AppFolio (Ph.D. â94) Gaetano Borriello , Jerre D.
